about_desc: I am a motivated {{age}}-year-old information and communication technology engineer with a particular passion for software development. I am analytical and solution-oriented by nature, applying first principles thinking to identify root causes of problems and discover effective solutions. In my free time, I enjoy programming, playing video games, and cycling.
experience_0_overview: I completed a Bachelor's Degree in Information and Communication Technology at Centria University of Applied Sciences.
experience_1_overview: I completed the Finnish Matriculation Examination at Kokkola Finnish Upper Secondary School.
experience_2_overview: I completed my comprehensive education at Hakalahti School.
experience_3_overview: In the autumn of 2025, I participated in the Saranen Consulting F.E.C. Program to deepen my DevOps knowledge and gain hands-on experience with modern development practices. Throughout the program, I worked with CI/CD pipelines, explored cloud technologies, and strengthened my understanding of cybersecurity principles. I also learned the fundamentals of Docker and Kubernetes, gaining insight into containerization and container orchestration in modern application deployment. The experience helped me build a stronger foundation for designing, automating, and maintaining reliable software delivery workflows, and it reinforced my interest in DevOps and cloud-native technologies.
